title: Tristate error on inout port connections

features.name: scalar_inout_port_replication
features.description: Code should include scalar inout port replication using concatenation {port, port} in module instantiation port connections
features.snippet: module top(inout VDD, inout VSS); sub sub(.VDD ({VDD, VDD}), .VSS ({VSS, VSS})); endmodule module sub(inout [1:0] VDD, inout [1:0] VSS); endmodule

features.name: vector_bit_inout_replication
features.description: Code should include vector bit extraction and replication in module instantiation for inout port connections (contrast to scalar replication bug)
features.snippet: module top(inout [1:0] GPIO); sub sub(.pads ({GPIO[0], GPIO[0]})); endmodule module sub(inout [1:0] pads); endmodule
